channel.title: BAND-MAID Social Mentions
channel.description: BAND-MAID mentions from across social media.

item.title: [BlueSky] おぼろっくにBAND-MAID？！
item.dc:creator: 秋葉 (rkc-akiba.bsky.social)
item.description:
おぼろっくにBAND-MAID？！
oborock.com/artist/

item.title: [BlueSky] Song: DICE

item.description:

Album: WORLD DOMINATION
Release: 2/13/2018

Arrangement: BAND-MAID
1st Live:3/9/2018
#bandmaid

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 【LINDBERGや打首獄門同好会も出演】
item.dc:creator: 音楽ナタリー (music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
【LINDBERGや打首獄門同好会も出演】
福井県敦賀市フェス「おぼろっく」最終出演者

KANA-BOON、BAND-MAID
NEK!、Maki、wacciら14組追加
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681273?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#おぼろっく

BlueSky · music.natalie.mu

item.title: [BlueSky] BARKS【インタビュー】7年ぶりヨーロッパツアーを経て「我らBAND-MAID、これまで以上にカッコ良くなっている」
item.dc:creator: 佐藤英男 (sato-hideo.bsky.social)
item.description:
BARKS【インタビュー】7年ぶりヨーロッパツアーを経て「我らBAND-MAID、これまで以上にカッコ良くなっている」
barks.jp/news/1078232/
“欧州での日々についても、彼女たちの記憶が鮮明なうちに訊いておきたい。とはいえ会話は、このバンドの仲の良さを無言のうちに伝えるかのような「ENERGETIC」のミュージックビデオのことから始まったのだった。”
取材・文◎増田勇一
撮影◎尾藤能暢
#BARKS #BANDMAID

BlueSky · sato-hideo.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] #julymusicchallenge
item.dc:creator: Neil Cameron (neilcam57.bsky.social)
item.description:
#julymusicchallenge
#musicchallenge
#blueskymusicchallenge

June 17 A song by an Asian band

Band-Maid "Freedom"|
youtu.be/FHpuEqMAcDg?...

item.title: [BlueSky] Genuinely, you gotta get them into jrock/jpop, it might work out for everyone
item.dc:creator: Steve Stevers (stevesteverers.whaleoilcandles.com)
item.description:
Genuinely, you gotta get them into jrock/jpop, it might work out for everyone

Throw on some Ado or Polkadot Stingray or Band Maid or whoever you find that you like

BlueSky · stevesteverers.whaleoilcandles.com

item.title: [BlueSky] MUCC -縁 [en]-" album (Disc 1 - Track #2) released on 11/22/2017. Included as ...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
MUCC -縁 [en]-" album (Disc 1 - Track #2) released on 11/22/2017. Included as a bonus track on the WORLD DOMINATION album. Played live once on 12/20/2017 at Rensa in Sendai when Band-Maid, Roach, and Hysteric Panic opened for MUCC. MUCC also later played the song and Saiki joined them on stage. (The

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 【インタビュー】7年ぶりヨーロッパツアーを経て「我らBAND-MAID、これまで以上にカッコ良くなっている」 | BARKS
item.dc:creator: Coca News (cocanews.bsky.social)
item.description:
【インタビュー】7年ぶりヨーロッパツアーを経て「我らBAND-MAID、これまで以上にカッコ良くなっている」 | BARKS

https://www.wacoca.com/news/2884042/

【インタビュー】7年ぶりヨーロッパツアーを経て「我らBAND-MAID、これまで以上にカッコ良くなっている」 実に7年ぶりとなるヨーロッパツアーからの帰国直後にあたる6月下旬のある日、BAND-MAIDの面々に話を聞いた [...]

item.title: [BlueSky] Ten acts you’ve seen, female lead singer edition:
item.dc:creator: Paul Baldowski 🔜 Tabletop Scotland (Sept. 4–6) (paulbaldowski.bsky.social)
item.description:
Ten acts you’ve seen, female lead singer edition:

Tori Amos
Regina Spektor
Marian Call
Cyndi Lauper

Um... I haven't seen many live bands. If I could see a few more, I'd add:

Band Maid
Sleeper
The Cardigans
Geike Arnaert
Skunk Anansie
The Audience/Sophie Ellis-Bextor

#LiveMusic

BlueSky · paulbaldowski.bsky.social

Now streaming on ballsack.tv
#music #ballsacktv #ballsackradio

BlueSky · feed.ballsack.tv

item.title: [BlueSky] Whilst in Osaka seeing Band-Maid a few years ago I decided to pop into the Ze...
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
Whilst in Osaka seeing Band-Maid a few years ago I decided to pop into the Zemaitis showroom to see the Miku Kobato guitar display.

The nice people there took time to talk to me and demanded I play one of their instruments.

So I did... Badly 🤣

I liked it so much I bought one for myself.

BlueSky · roboto-chan.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Reproduciendo ahora en J-POP FM 93.1: Shambles de BAND-MAID! Sintonice ahora:...

item.description:

BlueSky · jpopfm931pn.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] A few years ago I popped over to Sakai in Osaka for a Band-Maid show.
item.dc:creator: -Roboto-Chan- (roboto-chan.bsky.social)
item.description:
A few years ago I popped over to Sakai in Osaka for a Band-Maid show.

I was travelling alone so took time to investigate some small, back street coffee shops.

This one, called Akari Coffee, was awesome.

The owner was very cool, took time to listen to my rubbish Japanese and had a chat with me.

BlueSky · roboto-chan.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] Today is the birthday of everybody's favorite enthusiast of indie music, film...
item.dc:creator: Kara Buchanan 🏳️‍⚧️ (magicariot.com)
item.description:
Today is the birthday of everybody's favorite enthusiast of indie music, film photography, and mega hyper turbo gay-ass lesbianism from the "Magica Riot" series, Hazel Hoffman! You can be sure that Claire and Bloom will be participating in quite the birthday celebration with her today!

BlueSky · magicariot.com

item.title: [BlueSky] BAND-MAIDには思い当たるフシがあるな、、、
item.dc:creator: Sue Cat Boy (suecatboy.bsky.social)
item.description:
BAND-MAIDには思い当たるフシがあるな、、、

ベスト盤もそうだったけど
その後に出たアルバムの通常盤CD、
それなりに結構な値段するのに
歌詞ブックレットの出来があまりにもショボくてスゲエ損した気分ってか、得が無いなとシラケてしまったのがデカいな
しっかり値段相応に作ってくんね〜かな〜、、そう、シラケたんだよ

BlueSky · suecatboy.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 好きだった(まだファンではあるけど)
item.dc:creator: Sue Cat Boy (suecatboy.bsky.social)
item.description:
好きだった(まだファンではあるけど)

BAND-MAID
LOVEBITES

が何故だか最近になって聴けなくなった

BlueSky · suecatboy.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] #ミュージックライン #NHKラジオ
item.dc:creator: ひとりネズミ (hitorinezumi.fedibird.com.ap.brid.gy)
item.description:
#ミュージックライン #NHKラジオ
#らじるらじる の #聴き逃し配信 で聴いてる。

#オンエア曲
#お気に入り

BAND-MAID / Present Perfect (Official Music Video) - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yzSdgw-tdr0

BAND-MAID「Present Perfect」の歌詞 / 歌詞検索サービス「歌ネット」
https://www.uta-net.com/song/381782/

item.title: [BlueSky] Song: Spirit!!
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
Song: Spirit!!
Album: WORLD DOMINATION
Release: 2/13/2018
Music: BAND-MAID
Lyrics: 小鳩ミク [Kobato, Miku]
Arrangement: BAND-MAID
1st Live:4/3/2018
#bandmaid

item.title: [BlueSky] I'm just now about halfway through a live DVD that BAND-MAID just released th...
item.dc:creator: Acer Rubrum (d-t-39810.bsky.social)
item.description:
I'm just now about halfway through a live DVD that BAND-MAID just released thinking about how MISA (bass) is just thundering in this video. Every bass player in the world should listen to her. She's one of a kind. Their most recent OMV would not be a bad place to start if you are a bass player.

BlueSky · d-t-39810.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] I forget, have you heard Band Maid? They might appeal to you. Their rhythm se...
item.dc:creator: Alex P (alexpi.bsky.social)
item.description:
I forget, have you heard Band Maid? They might appeal to you. Their rhythm section frequently takes center stage

item.title: [BlueSky] #ミュージックライン #NHKラジオ

item.description:

#らじるらじる の #聴き逃し配信 で聴いてる。

#オンエア曲
#お気に入り

BAND-MAID / ENERGETIC (Official Music Video) - YouTube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NpZjslVGhbE

BAND-MAID「ENERGETIC」の歌詞 / 歌詞検索サービス「歌ネット」
https://www.uta-net.com/song/394891/

BlueSky · hitorinezumi.fedibird.com.ap.brid.gy

item.title: [BlueSky] #ミュージックライン #NHKラジオ
item.dc:creator: ひとりネズミ (hitorinezumi.fedibird.com.ap.brid.gy)
item.description:
#ミュージックライン #NHKラジオ
#らじるらじる の #聴き逃し配信 で聴いてる。

"BAND-MAID

初回放送日：2026年7月6日

今夜のゲストはＢＡＮＤ－ＭＡＩＤのＳＡＩＫＩ。悲願の日本武道館リベンジへ…ワールドツアーの手ごたえ、「昔は話したくなかった」ライブＭＣの“言葉の大切さ”に気づいた転機を告白！ライブ初披露で涙した新曲「Ｄａｙｓ」、２０２７年ライブ活動小休止に向けてファンへの“赤裸々な思い”をつづったという作詞エピソードを語る！リクエスト・メッセージは番組ホームページから、感想は＃ミュージックラインで！

楽曲一覧
Ｃｒａｖｅ 三浦大知 （3分53秒)
Ｐｒｅ […]

BlueSky · hitorinezumi.fedibird.com.ap.brid.gy

item.dc:creator: AZ Obsesses (azobsesses.bsky.social)
item.description:
I could name a bunch of Bloodywood songs, but those often have English sections. “Fate” by BAND-MAID also has English bits.

So I have to go with this.

youtu.be/1lfb-280MhU?...

item.title: [BlueSky] KANAMI: The theme here is “circus”. We had finished the album, but then SAIKI...
item.dc:creator: Band-Maid Song of the Day Bot (bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social)
item.description:
KANAMI: The theme here is “circus”. We had finished the album, but then SAIKI mentioned that a BAND-MAID record isn’t complete without an instrumental. Composing this made me feel like we found the missing piece to a puzzle.

MIKU & SAIKI: The title is all about climbing higher, even still. We can d

BlueSky · bandmaidsongbot.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] mora ハイレゾランキング［2026.6.23 – 29］今週の1位はYOASOBI！Michael Jackson、Hollywood Movie W...
item.dc:creator: MAGMOE (magmoe.bsky.social)
item.description:
mora ハイレゾランキング［2026.6.23 – 29］今週の1位はYOASOBI！Michael Jackson、Hollywood Movie Works、mora Acousticの人気作に、Hiromitsu Kitayama、BAND-MAID、SUPER BEAVER、竹達彩奈、Museの新譜もランクイン！

https://www.magmoe.com/3079261/movie/2026-07-06/

今週の１位は、YOASOBIの“読むCD”としてシリーズ化してきたEPの4作目が獲得！2位には、映画公開で話題のMichael …

BlueSky · magmoe.bsky.social

item.description:
https://sakurajima.moe/tags/WordWeavers 7.1 — If your MC wore tee shirts, what would be on their favorite one?

T-shirs are cool with my characters.

Arisu. ins https://sakurajima.moe/tags/SakuraTrick t.So here is Kao in a https://sakurajima.moe/tags/BandMaid t.Kao in a https://sakurajima.moe/tags/IsTheOrderARabbit? (https://sakurajima.moe/tags/GochiUsa) t.Kao in a "Cute is Justice" t.Kao in a https://sakurajima.moe/tags/BandMaid thttps://sakurajima.moe/tags/NMWW https://sakurajima.moe/tags/NMPrompts

item.title: [BlueSky] Coming soon
item.dc:creator: LeScottLePalmr (lescottlepslmer.bsky.social)
item.description:
Coming soon

South Park Man Pile on Tour.

Tom Araya, Kid Rock, Gene Simmons, Zoltan Bathory, Blackie Lawless, Aron Lewis, Vanilla Ice and more.
With Morgan Wallen to yell " Dey Terk Ar Jerbs"

Outside any concert The Warning, Hanabie, Band Maid etc are playing.

Tickets on sale at Ticketmaster

item.title: [BlueSky] It's interesting that the Japanese female rock bands have had this attitude f...
item.dc:creator: Barry McKinnon (rockyuphill.bsky.social)
item.description:
It's interesting that the Japanese female rock bands have had this attitude forever, they aren't rivals, they are all young women pursuing their best life in the same industry, and they attend each other's shows, and are happy for everyone's successes. Even working with bands from other countries.

BlueSky · rockyuphill.bsky.social

item.title: [BlueSky] 😆 Love it! Newest Band-Maid video, Energetic, has them all sitting around a ...
item.dc:creator: Deadling (deadling.bsky.social)
item.description:

😏

#MusicChallenge
#MusicSky
